The Court stated that it is 10:00 a.m., that there is no appearance by Ms. King and that an Order to Show Cause will be issued regarding removal. The status of filing a petition for final distribution, the Order Suspending Executor and the Order to Show Cause were continued to February 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:45 a.m., that there is no appearance by Ms. King and that it will issue an order suspending her powers. The Order to Show Cause and that status of filing a petition for final distribution were continued to January 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeannine Marie King, Petitioner in pro per
Ms. King stated that she had not known that there were additional forms she was required to file with the Court, but that she had spoken with the Probate Examiner and learned of the further filings that were needed. She also stated that there was a creditor's claim which she needed to pay. The Court inquired if she has obtained legal assistance from an attorney or probate paralegal. Ms. King responded that she had spoken with two paralegals by telephone, but had been unaware of what additional forms she needed to submit. She plans to have further contact with a paralegal now that she knows what needs to be done. The Status Hearing was continued to September 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause regarding removal will be issued to the Personal Representative Jeannine Marie King to appear on August 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she should not be removed and why the Inventory & Appraisal and petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing and the Order to Appear are also continued to that date.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jeannine Marie King to appear on June 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
